testcase.name: tv external ids pass through
movie extracts director from crew
movie actors top 5 by order
movie actors sorted by order when out of order
tv director from created_by first
collection index null when movie not in parts
movie imdb id from external_ids preferred over root
movie info map contains overview and tagline
movie maps year from release_date
tv maps as EPISODE with year from first_air_date
parseYear extracts first 4 chars
movie certification prefers US release_date
season 0 marks special episode number
tv certification from content_ratings US
collection fills collectionIndex by release_date order and collectionYears
movie collection name and id from belongs_to_collection
movie localize maps translations to lang title
light movie search result maps minimal fields
light tv search result maps minimal fields
movie certification falls back to first country when no US
multi-episode titles merged with A and B
movie extracts genres names
season fills episode numbers and titles for single episode
